summary: Embed bulk pass — 1,327 new chunks (corpus expansion delta)
description:
## Why now

The `corpus-expansion-tickets` branch added 1,327 chunks across 7 new
traditions + 4 deepened existing ones (full breakdown below). None are
embedded yet. The bulk pass must run before retrieval queries against
those traditions return anything.

## Pre-flight counts (snapshot 2026-06-03)

| Tradition          | On disk | Embedded | Unembedded |
|--------------------|--------:|---------:|-----------:|
| pagan_witchcraft   |     76  |      0   |       76  |
| norse              |     32  |      0   |       32  |
| shinto             |      1  |      0   |        1  |
| yoruba             |    159  |      0   |      159  |
| finnic             |    275  |      0   |      275  |
| celtic             |    192  |      0   |      192  |
| upanishads (Îsâ)   |      2  |      0   |        2  |
| platonism (Tier 1) |    205  |     36   |      169  |
| buddhism (Tier 1)  |     88  |     19   |       69  |
| neoplatonism (T1)  |   1046  |    828   |      218  |
| christian_mysticism (T1) | 316 | 182  |      134  |
| **Total new**      |         |          | **1,327**  |

## Safety

`embed_corpus.py` uses `INSERT OR REPLACE INTO chunk_embeddings`. New
`chunk_id`s have no collision with existing 3,128 rows — purely
additive. The new chunks must first appear in the `nodes` table
(FK constraint with `ON DELETE CASCADE`); `graph_bootstrap.py` handles
that idempotently.

Existing embeddings / staged_tags / edges remain untouched. This is the
safe path the user signed off on.

## Procedure

1. `python3 scripts/graph_bootstrap.py --dry-run` — preview nodes that
   would be added (expect ~1,327 chunks + 6 tradition nodes:
   pagan_witchcraft, norse, shinto, yoruba, finnic, celtic).
2. `python3 scripts/graph_bootstrap.py` — apply.
3. `python3 scripts/embed_corpus.py` — embeds all unembedded chunks
   against `ollama/nomic-embed-text` (config/embedding.toml). Ollama
   verified running 2026-06-03.
4. `python3 scripts/validate_index.py` — confirms chunk_count ==
   vector_count and similarity spot-check passes.
5. Verify counts: pre vs post chunk_embeddings count should differ by
   exactly 1,327 (or close — depends on any drift between snapshot and
   execution).

## Out of scope

- Tagging the new chunks (separate pipeline run, `tag_concepts.py`).
- Edge proposal (separate pipeline run, `propose_edges.py`).
- SBE re-acquire — that's its own much riskier ticket (1,942 staged_tags
  + 1,559 live edges at stake; see sister ticket).

Files: scripts/embed_corpus.py, scripts/graph_bootstrap.py,
scripts/validate_index.py, config/embedding.toml, data/guru.db.

resolution.note: Embed pass complete in 42s. graph_bootstrap.py registered 1,327 new chunk nodes + 7 new tradition nodes (upanishads, pagan_witchcraft, norse, shinto, yoruba, finnic, celtic). embed_corpus.py ran across all 4,455 chunks; nomic-embed-text deterministic so existing vectors got rewritten identically (idempotent). validate_index.py confirms chunks==vectors==4,455 and similarity spot-check passes. Zoroastrian legacy chunk_embeddings (152) untouched as expected — no downstream artifacts disturbed. data/guru.db is gitignored so no git changes beyond .todo/.
